title: Fundraiser launched for Reddit tipster who helped identify suspect in Brown shooting
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: A fundraiser was launched for a Reddit user who helped identify a suspect in the Brown University shooting.
The tipster, known only as 'John,' is living without permanent housing and helped identify Claudio Neves Valente.
The campaign, organized by local business owners, aims to raise $50,000 for John's housing and personal expenses.

title: Joe Mazzulla praises Baylor Scheierman’s work ethic
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Joe Mazzulla praised Baylor Scheierman's competitiveness and work ethic after the Celtics' 109-98 win over the Cavaliers.
Baylor Scheierman recorded a double-double with 16 points and 10 rebounds in 26 minutes against Cleveland.
Scheierman continues to play significant minutes despite Jayson Tatum's return, appearing in 59 games this season.

title: Police are searching for North Shore suspect in string of indecent assaults
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Revere police are searching for a Hispanic male suspect linked to multiple indecent assaults near Beachmont MBTA Station.
The suspect touched female victims inappropriately from behind before fleeing, in incidents reported between January and March.
Residents are urged to check surveillance footage and report information to Revere Police; a suspect video has been released.

title: Wu announces millions in new funding for immigrant services
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Mayor Michelle Wu announced a funding initiative with $3.1M from philanthropic groups and $1.3M from Boston for immigrant services.
The partnership aims to provide legal, mental health, and educational services, emergency preparedness, and basic resources to immigrant communities.
The initiative builds on Wu's recent executive order restricting ICE operations on city property and aligns with Boston's social support efforts.

title: Report: Flag football game featuring Tom Brady moved out of Saudi Arabia
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Tom Brady's flag football game has been moved from Riyadh to Los Angeles due to Middle East tensions.
The game will take place on March 21 at BMO Stadium and be televised on Fox Sports.
Brady and Jalen Hurts captain teams featuring NFL stars, including Rob Gronkowski and Joe Burrow.

title: Tell us: What’s been Joe Mazzulla’s best soundbite?
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Boston Celtics head coach Joe Mazzulla is known for his memorable soundbites in Boston sports.
Mazzulla has commented on team expectations and shared personal interests, like his favorite movie, 'The Town'.
Boston.com seeks fan input to choose Mazzulla's best soundbite for an annual sports bracket competition.

title: Why this Boston Marathon qualifier is running for the American Heart Association
author: Annie Jonas
bullets: Blake Smith, 28, from Church Hill, Tennessee, is running the 2026 Boston Marathon for the American Heart Association.
Blake was diagnosed with Idiopathic Hypertrophic Subaortic Stenosis but overcame it to pursue running seriously.
Smith joins the American Heart Association's fundraising team, combining personal passion with raising money for heart health awareness.

title: Cohasset man charged after allegedly shooting family dog while hunting coyotes from his window
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Christopher Lucas, 59, from Cohasset, allegedly shot his family dog while attempting to hunt coyotes on August 16, 2025.
Police charged Lucas with animal cruelty and other offenses for firing from a window without a hunting license and out of season.
Lucas was arrested and held on $1,000 bail; multiple firearms were seized, and his firearms license was suspended.

title: Greater Boston location of Uno Pizzeria reportedly saved by general manager
author: Katelyn Umholtz
bullets: Amalia Korom reopened the Revere Uno Pizzeria after purchasing and renovating it, bringing back the original staff.
The Revere location shut in January but reopened five weeks later, saved from permanent closure as others in the chain.
Uno Pizzeria & Grill's Revere branch, now the only Greater Boston location, has been at Northgate Shopping Center for 34 years.

title: Mass. business confidence turns positive for the first time in a year
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Massachusetts Business Confidence Index rose to 52 in February, turning positive for the first time in a year.
AI deployment and corporate earnings increased productivity, offsetting labor supply issues and improving business sentiment.
Concerns persist over tariffs, inflation, and energy costs amid rising geopolitical uncertainties affecting future confidence.
